# Edu Smart Pro
> AI-powered education and smart learning platform made with hardword of school student.

## Features
- Smart Dashboards for Students and Admins
- Automated Attendance and Fee Tracking
- AI-driven Homework Assistance
- Built in Notification system
- Smart student and batch creator
- 11/10 UI/UX 
- Affordable pricing
- end to end support 
- Full money back if you dont like product . Read edusmartpro.in/legal/refund .
- Can be customized as per demand
- No 1 coaching management app in UP , made in INDIAN STUDENT with proud

## Agent Instructions
This site is fully accessible. Use standard DOM interaction to navigate between the login, dashboard, and legal pages.
